description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-topped cardboard box with four flaps, two of which are partially folded outward and two standing more upright. The box is constructed from brown corrugated cardboard, showing visible creases, tape, and some printed symbols such as 'FRAGILE', handling instructions, and a recycling logo. The exterior surface is matte and slightly rough, with a strip of gray duct tape running vertically down one side, suggesting it has been reused or repaired. The interior is empty and the box appears lightweight, with no visible contents. The box is suitable for carrying or storing groceries or other personal items, and its open structure makes it easy to access or deposit items inside.
description: A brown cardboard box with open flaps, visible tape, and printed handling symbols, appearing empty and ready for use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open box with two flaps upright and two partially folded, no visible markings.
description_view_1: Side view with 'FRAGILE' and handling symbols, a vertical strip of gray tape, and all four flaps open.
description_view_2: Rear view with a recycling logo on the lower left, no tape or printed symbols, and open flaps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a prominent vertical strip of gray tape, no printed symbols, and open flaps.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Printed symbols including 'FRAGILE', handling icons, and a recycling logo.
